profile.name: YUTISIO
profile.title: SOFTWARE ENGINEER
bio_paragraphs: I am a Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications using modern technologies such as React, Next.js, and React Native, along with backend development in Python, Laravel, and CodeIgniter. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and designing efficient systems that solve real business problems. I am comfortable working both independently and within teams, consistently delivering reliable solutions across different project scopes.

My experience includes working in the oil & gas fabrication industry, where IT was not initially a core focus. In this environment, I contributed to driving digital transformation initiatives that streamlined operations, reduced manual processes, and significantly improved efficiency—resulting in tangible business impact. I have also collaborated with international clients and distributed teams, strengthening my ability to communicate effectively and adapt in global, fast-paced environments.
